---
layout: default
title: "Rajya Sabha Shifts and Legislative Updates"
date: 2026-06-30T04:43:07.015328+00:00
summary: "The NDA strengthens its Rajya Sabha position as new members are sworn in, while Parliament passes key legislation and states navigate local political tensions"
run_time_ist: "10:13AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:13AM</p>


## India National Politics

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Rajya Sabha composition:</strong> The NDA’s legislative strength in the Upper House has increased following recent election results in West Bengal and the swearing-in of new members, potentially facilitating the passage of major reforms like the Women&#x27;s Reservation Bill.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxQaC1YY2JCaVA3ekFOQnM3OWVxT0hxNmt5dlE1aWdWSXFLWk0tZWlCZUdEdWpZM0tod184MTkwbkU3MnV3M3l6RXRqYzVuSUp5OGk2d3pJTmFISktSeWxiUkhKamQxX2JfVzRTSF9OU09SQzREYzdKZ0I1SUs4S3RJcUN5QnFjRGxyT1pscTRnbl9vQQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Parliamentary proceedings:</strong> Parliament has officially passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, marking a significant legislative development for inclusive policy.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Opposition leadership:</strong> Mallikarjun Kharge has been sworn in as a Rajya Sabha member following his re-election, reaffirming his role in the upper chamber.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqgFBVV95cUxQcFlqUDlzckpoVE0xaFJfamMxclFVNXA1QWpTWThPZ3h2dWhtUmVSSTh3akc4TF9VMXJYcmZYQnpLZnU4V3JwV2UtVTdKdkw0VEoyb2preE9FOHlCZ0QyNVpDcnN0OGVVdUZKLU5FM1ROUDdKeFAtLVlyX2tISGVHRUkxbUdfT2YyZzkxMWd5a3BlMVh4M0JCanpiSG1TbGV5dE13bXRjTFNlQQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a></span></li>
</ul>

## Policy and Institutions

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Delhi EV policy:</strong> The government has cleared a new Electric Vehicle policy for Delhi, which strategically prioritizes two-wheelers to address the city&#x27;s primary vehicle demographic.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W12</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political restrictions:</strong> Tensions have emerged in Uttar Pradesh after the state Congress chief was placed under house arrest ahead of a planned delegation visit to the Ram Mandir in Ayodhya.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a></span></li>
</ul>
